Corpus dossier smoke fixture (HTML)

This file exists so the dossier-mode ingestion smoke test (issue #354) can prove that the per-page ingestion pipeline handles formats that have no page concept. Every chunk written for this file should carry metadata.parent_file pointing at this file's URI and leave metadata.page_no set to null.

The body is deliberately verbose so that local_corpus._chunk_text still emits at least one chunk after whitespace normalization. We mention a few keywords that the assertions can grep for if useful: alpha, beta, gamma. The integration test should not depend on any single phrase, only on the metadata shape.
